meta.composition: professional vs professional (levyVsProfessional grid: pure levy attacker, open field)

openField.description: no modifiers (plains, no walls, no cards)

riverCrossing.description: attacking across a strait / amphibiously: attacker -1 (threshold space)

wall1.description: direct assault on intact tier-1 walls (defender +2, escalade -1)

wall2.description: direct assault on intact tier-2 walls (defender +3, escalade -1)

wall3.description: direct assault on intact tier-3/Theodosian-class walls (defender +4, escalade -1)

levyVsProfessional.description: pure levy attacker vs professional defender, open field (quality gap)
